name: HydraClean HP-9000
manual_excerpt: HP-9000 is certified for high-pressure industrial steel cleaning up to 9000 PSI and alloy-safe nozzle assemblies.

name: InnoFlow MP-5000
manual_excerpt: MP-5000 supports mixed-material cleaning lines and remains stable at up to 5000 PSI in continuous operation.

name: EcoWash LP-2500
manual_excerpt: LP-2500 is designed for lower-pressure maintenance tasks on lightweight materials such as composite and aluminum.
